briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of fintech middleware firm Synapse, raising serious questions about consumer protection in embedded finance.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is pushing credit card products into increasingly unconventional territory, reshaping how consumers think about credit and rewards.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple's acquisition of open banking startup Credit Kudos signals Big Tech's growing ambitions in financial data and consumer lending.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping competition in the payments landscape globally.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Canada's economy contracted unexpectedly in fourth quarter of 2025](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canada-gdp-dec-2025-9.7108015?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Canada's GDP shrank unexpectedly in Q4 2025, adding pressure on financial institutions, fintechs, and policymakers heading into 2026.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — *(Relevant to Canada)* Canada's early stance against screen scraping and its open banking timeline set the stage for the regulatory evolution still unfolding today.

- **[Manitoba looks to spur more investment with tax credit ceiling raise](https://betakit.com/manitoba-looks-to-spur-more-investment-with-tax-credit-ceiling-raise/)** — *BetaKit* — Manitoba is raising its tax credit ceiling to attract more startup and tech investment, reflecting a broader Canadian push to strengthen regional innovation ecosystems.

- **[Ada Doubles YoY Growth as Demand for Agentic Customer Service Surges](https://financialpost.com/pmn/business-wire-news-releases-pmn/ada-doubles-yoy-growth-as-demand-for-agentic-customer-service-surges)** — *Financial Post* — Toronto-based AI company Ada has doubled year-over-year growth, with strong enterprise adoption of its agentic customer service platform across multiple industries, including financial services.

- **[How the U.S.-Iran conflict is impacting gas prices in Canada](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canadian-gas-prices-us-iran-9.7111371?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Escalating Middle East tensions are pushing energy costs higher in Canada, with downstream effects on household finances and consumer spending relevant to financial inclusion.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Fintech dystopia](https://fintechdystopia.com/)** — *Hacker News* — A thought-provoking look at the darker potential outcomes of fintech expansion, raising important questions about consumer protection, financial inclusion, and regulatory oversight that are directly relevant to building a responsible Atlantic Canadian fintech ecosystem.

- **[CCI wants governments to buy more Canadian healthtech](https://betakit.com/cci-wants-governments-to-buy-more-canadian-healthtech/)** — *BetaKit* — The Canadian Council of Innovators is calling on governments to prioritize procurement of domestic tech solutions — a policy model that Atlantic Fintech advocates could apply to push for greater adoption of locally built fintech tools in the region.

- **[Reflections from a 10-year entrepreneur](https://betakit.com/reflections-from-a-10-year-entrepreneur/)** — *BetaKit* — A candid long-form reflection on the Canadian startup journey offers timely lessons for Atlantic Canadian fintech founders navigating early-stage growth and ecosystem building.
